name: merterbak/Grok-MCP
description: MCP server for xAI's Grok API with agentic tool calling, image generation, vision, and file support.

name: JSON MCP
description: MCP server empowers LLMs to interact with JSON files efficiently. With JSON MCP, you can split, merge, etc.

name: OctoEverywhere/mcp
description: A 3D printer MCP server that allows for getting live printer state, webcam snapshots, and printer control.

name: aashari/mcp-server-aws-sso
description: AWS Single Sign-On (SSO) integration enabling AI systems to securely interact with AWS resources by initiating SSO login, listing accounts/roles, and executing AWS CLI commands using temporary credentials.

name: Bucket
description: Flag features, manage company data, and control feature access using Bucket

name: AutomateLab-tech/content-distribution-mcp
description: Publish one piece of content to DEV.to, Hashnode, GitHub Discussions, Reddit, Bluesky, LinkedIn, Medium and Twitter with idempotent state and per-platform adaptation.

name: Windows Control
description: Programmatic control over Windows system operations including mouse, keyboard, window management, and screen capture using nut.js.

name: mbrummerstedt/powerbi-analyst-mcp
description: Connect LLMs to Power BI semantic models. Browse workspaces, tables, and measures, run DAX queries, and automatically page large results via local CSV.

name: Vega-Lite
description: Generate visualizations from fetched data using the VegaLite format and renderer.

name: pilat/mcp-datalink
description: MCP server for secure database access (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite) with parameterized queries and schema inspection

name: Webflow
description: Interact with Webflow APIs to list and edit your site and CMS data.

name: laundromatic/shopgraph
description: Structured product data from the open web — Schema.org + AI extraction for e-commerce enrichment. Pay per call via Stripe. shopgraph.dev

name: drolosoft/go-docs-mcp
description: Multi-format document MCP server — read, search, OCR, and extract from PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX, CSV, and images. Single Go binary, 12 tools, smart mtime-based caching, directory-locked security.

name: kukapay/dex-pools-mcp
description: An MCP server that provides AI agents with real-time access to DEX liquidity pool data.

name: Milofax/xert-mcp
description: MCP server for XERT cycling analytics — access fitness signature (FTP, HIE, PP), training status, workouts, activities with XSS metrics, and MPA analysis.

name: Keycloak
description: MCP server implementation for managing Keycloak users, groups, and realms using natural language queries.

name: martingeidobler/android-mcp-server
description: 21-tool Android device control via ADB — screenshots with compression, UI tree inspection, touch automation, logcat, and compound actions like tap-and-wait. One-command install via npx android-mcp-server.

name: Contentrain/ai
description: Local-first MCP server for AI content governance — 13 tools for model/content CRUD, validation, normalization, and i18n across any framework.

name: geolabel/geolabel-mcp
description: GPS coordinates to AI-ready location context — returns place name, stable category (gym, supermarket, restaurant…), and live opening hours via OpenStreetMap. Works in Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, and any MCP client.

name: SearchAtlas
description: SEO, content generation, PPC, keyword research, site auditing, authority building, and LLM

name: imprvhub/mcp-status-observer
description: Model Context Protocol server for monitoring Operational Status of major digital platforms in Claude Desktop.

name: Jean Memory
description: Premium memory consistent across all AI applications.

name: ScreenshotOne
description: Render website screenshots with ScreenshotOne

name: Jungle-Grid/mcp-server
description: MCP server for Jungle Grid, an agentic GPU execution layer that lets AI agents estimate, submit, monitor, and fetch logs for inference, training, fine-tuning, and batch workloads.

name: Everything
description: Reference / test server with prompts, resources, and tools.

name: Embassy-of-the-Free-Mind/sourcelibrary-v2
description: Search and cite rare historical texts (alchemy, Hermeticism, Renaissance philosophy) with DOI-backed academic citations from Source Library

name: lpigeon/ros-mcp-server
description: The ROS MCP Server supports robot control by converting user-issued natural language commands into ROS or ROS2 control commands.

name: Microsandbox
description: Self-hosted platform for secure execution of AI code. Great for Code Interpreter, Data Analysis, Browser Use.

name: isnow890/naver-search-mcp
description: MCP server for Naver Search API integration, supporting blog, news, shopping search and DataLab analytics features.

name: forest6511/secretctl
description: AI-safe secrets manager with MCP integration. Run commands with credentials injected as environment variables - AI agents never see plaintext secrets. Features output sanitization, AES-256-GCM encryption, and Argon2id key derivation.
